mti_meta.title: Framework B Soul Word Analysis — Master Term Index
usage_instructions: Before starting STEP data gathering for a new word, extract the Strong's numbers from the STEP term list.
Run a lookup of those Strong's numbers against this index.
Any match with status 'extracted' is a cross-reference term — do not re-extract. Note the owning_registry.
Any non-match is a new term — extract in full in Session A.
After Session A completes, add new terms to this index and update also_used_in for cross-reference terms.
File must be re-saved after every update. Filename: WA-MTI-framework-b-terms-[yyyy-mm-dd].json
